name: RST

sections.intro: R.S.T. Corporationis the secondislandin the gameInto the Breach.
sections.Island-Specific Missions: Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
sections.Reputation Objectives:
- Defend the Earth Mover: 1 ReputationAn Earth Mover situated around the middle of the map periodically creates more ground in a line. The map will have many chasms when starting.
  - Defend the Terraformer + Terraform the grassland back to desert: 1 Reputation each, 2 in totalA Terraformer is situated around the centre of the map and can convert 6 tiles in front of it into desert, kililng anything standing in the way. There are 20 tiles of grassland surrounding it which requires 4 turns to fully remove.
  - Destroy 2 Mountains: 1 ReputationSome mountains start off cracked at the start of the mission.
  - Protect the two prototype Renfield Bombs: 2 Reputation, 1 for each bombTwo prototype Renfield Bombs appear on the map and will explode to deal 1 damage to surrounding tiles when they are destroyed.
  - Defend the Train: 2 ReputationA two-tile long maglev moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes adamaged trainand one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.Also present onArchive, Inc.andDetritus Disposal.
sections.Power Grid Objectives: - Defend both Solar Farms: 2 Grid PowerTwo Solar Farms must be protected, earning 1 power for each one that survives.
sections.Special Conditions:
- CataclysmA row of chasms will sprout from one edge of the map and slowly consume the land.Missions last 4 turns under this condition.
  - Seismic ActivityEach turn a set of 3 ground tiles will become chasms during the enemy turn.
  - Erosion PointsThe map has several chasms whereHornetsand their alphas emerge. This can result in a mission having two non-psion species of flying Vek, which is usually disallowed.
  - Lightning Strikes4 tiles in the battlefield are randomly targeted by lightning strikes each turn.Lightning strikes will instantly killany unit that gets hit by them.
  - Windstorm (Advanced Edition)Two rows will be pushed by one tile in a single direction each turn.
  - Sandstorm (Advanced Edition)A row of smoke will kick up every turn from the edge of the map.Missions last 4 turns under this condition.
  - Evacuated Buildings (Advanced Edition)Two grid buildings away from each other are replaced with trap buildings that have 2 health. They can be detonated at will to destroy all units next to them without depleting the grid or hitting other grid buildings.

full_text:
R.S.T. Corporation
Details
CEO
Jessica Kern
Environment
Desert
“
Terraforming specialists, R.S.T. turned the environment against the Vek and nearly destroyed their island in the process.
„
R.S.T. Corporation
is the second
island
in the game
Into the Breach
.
Contents
1
Map
2
Island-Specific Missions
2.1
Reputation Objectives
2.2
Power Grid Objectives
2.3
Special Conditions
3
Regions
4
See also
Map
[
]
Island-Specific Missions
[
]
Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
Reputation Objectives
[
]
Defend the Earth Mover: 1 Reputation
An Earth Mover situated around the middle of the map periodically creates more ground in a line. The map will have many chasms when starting.
Defend the Terraformer + Terraform the grassland back to desert: 1 Reputation each, 2 in total
A Terraformer is situated around the centre of the map and can convert 6 tiles in front of it into desert, kililng anything standing in the way. There are 20 tiles of grassland surrounding it which requires 4 turns to fully remove.
Destroy 2 Mountains: 1 Reputation
Some mountains start off cracked at the start of the mission.
Protect the two prototype Renfield Bombs: 2 Reputation, 1 for each bomb
Two prototype Renfield Bombs appear on the map and will explode to deal 1 damage to surrounding tiles when they are destroyed.
Defend the Train: 2 Reputation
A two-tile long maglev moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes a
damaged train
and one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.
Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.
Also present on
Archive, Inc.
and
Detritus Disposal
.
Power Grid Objectives
[
]
Defend both Solar Farms: 2 Grid Power
Two Solar Farms must be protected, earning 1 power for each one that survives.
Special Conditions
[
]
Cataclysm
A row of chasms will sprout from one edge of the map and slowly consume the land.
Missions last 4 turns under this condition.
Seismic Activity
Each turn a set of 3 ground tiles will become chasms during the enemy turn.
Erosion Points
The map has several chasms where
Hornets
and their alphas emerge. This can result in a mission having two non-psion species of flying Vek, which is usually disallowed.
Lightning Strikes
4 tiles in the battlefield are randomly targeted by lightning strikes each turn.
Lightning strikes will instantly kill
any unit that gets hit by them.
Windstorm (
Advanced Edition)
Two rows will be pushed by one tile in a single direction each turn.
Sandstorm (
Advanced Edition)
A row of smoke will kick up every turn from the edge of the map.
Missions last 4 turns under this condition.
Evacuated Buildings (
Advanced Edition)
Two grid buildings away from each other are replaced with trap buildings that have 2 health. They can be detonated at will to destroy all units next to them without depleting the grid or hitting other grid buildings.

[
]
